111.content:
Goku's stomach growled, and he put both hands on it. "My tummy's hungry..." he moaned quietly. He had been staying with Bulma and her family while waiting for the Dragonballs to reactivate, and it was kind of boring. At the moment, it was even worse, because there was no food in the house, and Goku was incredibly hungry. Bulma and her mother were currently out of the house shopping for food, and Bulma's father was currently working on some new capsule. Needless to say, Goku was more or less alone. Sighing, Goku continued wandering throughout the house, looking everywhere he could for something to eat. "Where's the food?" he mumbled to himself. Eventually, he came across a big white box. Goku stared at it before recognizing it as the same thing that had been in Roshi's home. Laughing, he pulled the door open...

Only to see that there was no food in there. Hanging his head in disappointment, Goku continued on. He was about to leave the kitchen when he suddenly noticed something on top of the kitchen table. Puzzled, he stood on his toes and grabbed it, realizing it was a capsule. Curious, he threw it down on the ground, jumping back momentarily at the large puff of smoke. When the smoke cleared, he saw a box that was similar in shape and build to the food box, but pink-colored an smaller. Curious but excited, Goku opened the door. To his delight, the box was filled to the brim with all kinds of food. Giggling with delight. Goku immediately dug in. The food was among the most delicious he had ever tasted, and therefore barely noticed a few things that were happening to him. His stomach began expanding, and his sash began to stretch and tear. Hearing it, Goku hastily undid his sash, his belly peeking out the tiniest amount as he did so. As he continued to eat, his pants got even tighter, so he mindlessly reached down and unzipped his pants. As soon as he did so, more of his belly poked itself out from under his shirt. Ignoring this, he continued eating from the box, which seemed to endlessly be replenishing itself. Oddly enough, the only part of his body that seemed to be growing was his stomach; all the other parts of his body remained their original size. His shirt steadily began riding up, eventually resting a couple of inches above his belly button. Suddenly...
111.title: Feeding Frenzy

choices: Manages to make it to his room, where he takes a long nap
Runs into Bulma and her mother, returning from shopping
1111.content:
Goku was in the middle of shoving an apple into his mouth when the box shuddered and shook violently.

Shocked, Goku dropped the apple, falling backwards onto his hands. "What's happening?" He wondered aloud.

The box continued continued groaning and shifting, and, before, Goku's startled eyes, it suddenly expanded outwards!

Goku's mouth dropped open at this turn of events. "Uh..." Getting up off his hands and rubbing his belly, he stepped closer to further inspect this new development.

The box, now several times its original size, towered above Goku. What was more, the contents of the box seemed to have followed suit, at least in a way; cakes, ice cream, meat, pies, fruit, fish, and countless other kinds of enticing and delicious food had seemingly appeared out of nowhere, adding to shelves that had, minutes before, already been completely occupied.

As Goku ran his eyes over all of this, his still-open mouth twisted upwards into a smile. He'd never seen so much food in his life!

He didn't waste any time; he sprang at the box, grabbing onto the topmost shelf with one hand. Using the other, he began shoveling delicacies into his mouth. After a few seconds of this, Goku found, to his delight, that he could actually clamber up onto the shelves, once he had sufficiently cleared the perch of foodstuffs. Sitting in this position, his arms began grabbing at anything within reach. Fish, entire chickens, even a container of gravy...nothing was spared.

Once the top shelf was cleared, Goku clambered down onto the next shelf, where he repeated the process. Then the next shelf, and the next... soon, the entire food storage unit looked as though a pack of hyenas had been through it.

At long last, Goku cleared the last shelf and slid to the ground. Moaning due to the incredibly stuffed feeling he was experiencing, he slumped down, sliding until only his upper back was against the now-empty box. He placed both his hands on his belly, massaging it gently. The boy's stomach had extended several inches outwards, looking for all the world like a fleshy orb. His shirt had ridden completely up to his chest, and his pants became stretched, despite being completely undone.

Despite all of this, though, Goku couldn't be happier. "That was so yummy..." he murmured dreamily, grabbing his engorged gut and giving it a shake. He giggled; that was a funny feeling!

Goku spent a few minutes playing with his belly, expressing no end of amusement with the bloated protrusion, before he finally decided to stop. Grunting with effort, he got to his feet, he large, exposed belly throwing off his balance a bit.

Goku waddled away from the box, arms out at his side to keep his balance. Though he had a fair amount of difficulty making his way about without falling, he didn't mind; after all, that was the best meal he'd ever had!

After a few minutes of waddling about, Goku...
1111.title: So much food!

1112.content:
"Hey Gok..." Bulma stared at the monkey-tailed boy, unblinking as rubbed his stomach. She stood there for another moment, and then mumbled out a simple sentence.

"G-Goku," Bulma mumbled, a look of worry on her face, "What was in that box?"

"There was a lot of food in there, that's for sure!" Goku laughed and patted his stomach, "But I guess I ate it all!"

"Y-You did eh..." Bulma looked down, her hair drooping over her face.

"What's wrong Bulma?" Goku asked as he awkwardly pushed himself up from the ground, and waddled towards the teen, "Is it about the box?"

"Do you know what was in that food Goku?" Bulma asked, hoping the boy would've read the label.

"How would I know?" Goku replied, scratching his head.

"YOU IDIOT!" Bulma yelled as she slammed her fist on Goku's head, and the boy tumbled onto the ground, passed out.

'Just great', Bulma thought with a grim face, 'He ate all that food, why couldn't he have read the label!

Bulma walked over to the box, and looked at the top, and read it's label.

WARNING
The contents of this box are food containing weight-gain powder, and is meant for people who are under-weight, and is still in the prototype stage!
Your weight after eating a third of the contents may range from gaining five pounds to doubling your weight!
Please don't eat this until it is seen to have been successful in tests!

"Oh no!" Bulma shouted as she looked at the chubby unconscious boy, and then she whispered, "He seemed to be about 140 pounds before... and he ate the whole box..."
1112.title: Bulma walks in

They Get to the Tailor's Without Interruption
11121.content:
Goku woke up the next morning, and shook his head. He felt pretty weird this morning.

Goku yawned and raised his arms, which felt heavier. A lot heavier.

Goku looked down at his legs, but instead of seeing them, he saw his large stomach.

"Huh?" Goku mumbled as he touched it, feeling the softness of it. Then he felt his face, and extra skin that shouldn't have been there.

Goku sat up shakily, panting as he did so, as he had been weakened by this gain, and he ran to the washroom to look at himself in the mirror. Well, he wasn't really running. More of a fast waddle.

When Goku finally made it to the washroom, he was sweating profusely from his face, and panting heavily. He then looked at Bulma's full body mirror to see his reflection.

Goku's face had been quite chubby before, but this was overkill. A large amount of soft fat had been added to his cheeks and under his chin, making him unable to see his neck, like it was a large circle attached to a round body.

As he moved down his body, he saw his arms, their fat pressed against his sides, squishing outwards, and his hands looked like mini-sausages attached to large buns.

Moving to his large middle, he saw how destroyed his uniform now was. The belt seemed to have been ripped off by the sheer pressure of Goku's weight, tearing his Gi in two, revealing his man boobs and large blob that hung over his waist area, that blob having covered his developing chest and stomach muscles.

Finally, his legs. Some of their fat poked out through holes in his destroyed Gi, showing off his fat pale skin, which jiggled everytime Goku moved.

"I'm going to need new clothes," Goku mumbled as he felt his stomach, "Maybe I can ask Bulma for some new clothes."

~~When He Found Bulma~~

"Hey Bulma!" Goku called, waddling quickly over to Bulma, panting, "Do you have any clothes that would fit me!?"

"...Hey... Goku..." Bulma mumbled as she looked at the obese Saiyan boy, who had once had lean figure, "I think I could find somebody to make you new clothes."

"Thanks a bunch!" Goku laughed, his second chin jiggling.

"No problem Goku," Bulma chuckled as she left her room to go to the local tailor, "I just need you to come with me for this, as he needs to figure out your size."

"Okay!" and with that, the two left.
11121.title: Goku's Weight is Doubled (280 lbs.)

Goku then regained consciousness right then and there. “Owwww, what’d you do that for Bulma?” He asked his older friend. Before she could answer, Goku’s stomach started to growl. “Huh, that’s weird. I just ate the food from that box.” Goku said. He then started growing before his and Bulma’s eyes.

Goku’s belly was getting bigger and softer, his arms and hands were pudging up, fatty boobs were appearing on his chest causing his shirt to look tighter and tighter, his cheeks were getting puffier, and his legs were thickening. “Woah... this feels weird. Bulma, what’s going on?” Goku asked, almost sounding worried. Not only did he get fatter, but taller as well but only slightly. Once he stopped bloating, he was almost up to Bulma’s chest and his belly was the biggest part of his body being as huge as a beach ball. His shirt was only covering his chest at this point, and his pants were barely hanging on by a thread.

Bulma Jjust stood there, shocked at how big the monkey tailed boy had gotten. “Uhhhh, okay Goku... I’m going to go to the lab and figure out how to reverse this alright?” The blue haired girl told him. Goku started feeling around at his new body and replied “...

121.content:
It was just a few weeks ago that Cell was defeated. Everybody continued rejoicing because this meant that they could continue living. All, but one. Gohan was still mourning over the death of his father. In order to deal with the pain, all he's been doing was staying home eating. He gained around ten pounds already. His mother couldn't do anything but give him stuff to eat. After all, someone important did die.

One day, she realized that she made a mistake. Gohan was getting chubbier. His clothes could barely contain his body. "Gohan! This is enough! You need to go exercise!"

Gohan groaned and went outside. What does he do?
121.title: Kid Gohan

1211.content:
“99,998... 99,999... 100,00!”

The still fat Gohan panted heavily, his face as red as a tomato, laying on his back as he sweated bullets after completing a hundred thousand push ups. It hurt him a lot knowing what had happened to him, he was supposed to fill in his father’s shoes as the Earth’s protector. And here he was, a fat blob, struggling to even get up now, as he was very tired.

As he got up, something in his body ached, as he felt his heart. He knew this couldn’t be the heart virus Goku had during his bout with Android 19.

Soon, he couldn’t take it anymore as he passed out on the ground.

He then woke up to see himself in a giant room hundreds of times bigger than he was, much to his confusion. It almost looked like a dormitory, but it had a giant window to showcase the woods below, and a bed ten times Gohan’s size, which he woke up on.

Apparently, his mother had found him during the sunset hours, and carried him back, yes, carried him! It wasn’t much of a difficult task considering she was probably the strongest woman on the planet, and could lift something that could possibly be hundreds of pounds.

Next to Gohan, was a note written by his mother, and without hesitation, he picked it up and read it, and it was all about how sorry she was for forcing him to exercise. She didn’t put in why she didn’t want him to anymore, which was to prevent him from training. Now, she would allow him to get as fat as he wanted, but he wasn’t the one who asked for it, Chi-Chi started it noticing Gohan’s mood after Goku’s passing. But she did write there was a gift for actually trying just for her.

Then, one of the instructions on the note was to look to his right, and there were two buttons on a table. One red, one green.

The green was to have him drink, and the red was to have him eat.

He didn’t see any sort of door in sight, so he figured there wasn’t any sign of escape. Sure he could fly, but he was very heavy, and he couldn’t lift his arm up easily to form an energy blast to break the window, but knowing his mother, she had already thought of that.

Gohan then sighed, he could either succumb to his fate, or do something else. He then ultimately decided as he...
1211.title: obey his mother

12111.content:
Note: Chi-Chi changed Gohan’s clothes into the same gi he wore during the Cell Games, but with different materials thanks to alien tech, so the gi could hold out for a long one.

He pressed the red button, and soon, the bed began to sink as the floor it stood on separated from the rest of the floor, like an elevating platform, and soon stopped in a room below him, which surprisingly looked the same, but without a window, but lots of lightbulbs on the ceiling very, VERY high above him as he was now underground.

Then out of nowhere, the bed he was on begun to morph into a giant chair many sizes greater than Gohan, possibly to accommodate his future size. The chair began to move, lifting him up and tilting him back slightly forcing his belly to stick out in front of him.

Suddenly several robotic arms reached down from the ceiling and began speeding towards him. He gasped as they approached, but they stopped short of him and began grabbing items of food out of the blackness. The first one approached and stuffed a cake into his open mouth. A cream-filled snack cake of some kind. Gohan willingly chewed on it, as he found it very tasty. He ate it so fast only the squishy sweetness told him it was cream-filled. But that first food was very important for him to eat.

The chemicals inside Gohan’s chubby body would soon begin to absorb themselves into his fat reserves. Once there they would begin driving his body to make even more fat, causing his huge appetite to increase to the point of being almost insatiable. Anything Gohan ate would be converted into more fat so fast that very soon he’d find that no amount of food would be able to completely satisfy his hunger for a second. He would be driven to eat but he would never feel full, instead he would gain more weight with every morsel that passed his lips.

The next hands had thick sandwiches, filled with delicious meats. They tasted so good as he wolfed them down. A sort of binge feeling was beginning to comfort him and he began to relax, letting the machine stuff him silly and satisfy his hunger. The machines picked up the pace and he gasped for breath between mouthfuls as his lips were smothered by an entire rolled-up warm pizza being inserted into his mouth, occupying two of the robotic hands in order to hold up the drooping melted cheese as they crammed the sauce-smothered dough down his gullet.

More and more food followed from a seemingly endless supply. From ice cream sandwiches to whole gallon tubs of ice cream, even an entire tube of whipped topping was squeezed almost straight down his throat, followed by a whole submarine sandwich that was so big it took nearly all the hands to hold up, and hands holding napkins came to clean his face and body that had food on it. He was devouring a huge feast at an unbelievable speed, never in her life had she eaten this much.

Soon, the process began, as had been planned by Chi-Chi long ago. Gohan began to grin as a strange creaking sound was coming from his clothing. His eyes widened in anticipation he watched his fat visibly expand, slowly at first, but soon picking up pace, as he was blowing up like a big balloon while the endless parade of food continued.

Everything tasted so GOOD!

More into his mouth.

He looked like someone hooked up to a hose--growing, ready to explode. Burst. So full. Fat. And growing.

His arms were forced to spread apart to make room for his fat. His belly had spilt beyond the edge of the chair and was continuing to swell bigger and rounder without any signs of slowing down, as he grew taller as well.

His tastebuds were in heaven, but one part of his mind encouraged this while the other screamed for this madness to stop before she he any bigger.

His front was now totally exposed, but his expanding arms and back fat were still held by his gi, which continued to get tighter and tighter until it began to tear at the shoulders, his huge fat arms also bursting the sleeves. His chest and neck fat swelled too.

Now nigh naked, the 5000lb boy continued to grow bigger and bigger, fatter and fatter as the weight kept piling on. The deluge of food showed no sign of stopping. Flavour exploded in his mouth as a long line of cheese sticks were stuffed into him two at a time. The food still tasted divine but he would have enjoyed more if he wasn't so worried he might pop at any second.

He hoped he wouldn’t, but he still lived all of this.

Several extra padded mechanical hands sprang out from the sides of the chair and began massaging his titanic belly as more fattening junk food was stuffed into his gaping mouth. The massaging seemed to help digestion and his weight began to increase even more rapidly.

He was getting frighteningly huge! Had he already become the fattest kid in the world? Oh but he was going to get bigger than his imagination had ever dreamed.

For a long time, he remembered nothing but a glazed whirl of food. Nothing but the rhythm of open, stuff, chew, open, stuff, chew, open, stuff, chew...

His flesh felt wonderful as the extra padded robotic arms massaged his rolls sending his entire body into waves of motion. His brain was alive with endorphins. The bigger he grew, the more skin there was to be massaged.

He simply felt a warm feeling in his belly that held so tightly to his brain that he never felt the pain of his stomach-ache as his body exceeded it’s capacity for fat. He could hear his skin stretching like rubber however. The chemicals in his fat cells could only increase the elasticity of his skin so far it would seem. His wobbly jiggly flesh was beginning to tighten up as his body ran out of room to store all the fat it was creating.

Gohan was absolutely round now. His arms stuck out helplessly. His belly had spilled out on to the floor, tight and round now it groaned loudly as it grew. His chubby cheeks had only ballooned very slightly, his arms stuck straight out to her sides as the rolls of fat under them pushed out further and further. Still, fatter he grew as the machine fed him even more still showing no signs of stopping.

His belly rumbled loudly as he continued to suck down food at an alarming rate and swelled even bigger still. He was so fat, so round! His round belly stuck straight out of him for several meters, that distance gradually increasing with every second.

The robot arms were still rubbing and massaging it as if they were coaxing it to grow. It was so huge and fat, you could have lost your whole arm in it’s flesh if you plunged it. The numerous rolls down his sides, supported his arms and shoulders, whose fat pushing him up. It seemed even as he kept swelling, his face would never be engulfed in his fat.

It seemed the machine was intent on stuffing every last bit of food into him that it could. A few more chocolates were crammed in and another strange and scary rumbling sound even louder this time.

The robot arms backed away as Gohan listened to his fat body gurgle, jiggle and flop about as the arms all worked his expanding flesh. He was still expanding gradually and whimpered at the occasional creaking stretching noises expecting each one to result in him bursting like a balloon.

Gohan’s hunger was now nigh satisfied, he just needed one more piece of food, that’s all he wanted.

Then, two robotic arms came. One holding a cup of water, and the other, a red pill, which it dropped into the cup of water as it dissolved, and one the hand retracted back to the ceiling, while the other pushed the cup of water towards the humongous, fat blob that was Gohan.

This one, was forceful as it simply dumped the water into Gohan’s mouth as he chuffed it down, and once it was all gone, so was the hand and cup.

For a short while, Gohan felt nothing. His hunger had been completely satisfied. Then, eyes went wide as he realised what she’d just done. He could feel his belly stretching out just a little more to try and fit it in.

Then there was a deep rumbling sound. It grew louder and louder, then started a horrible stretching sound as Gohan began to swell like a parade balloon. His rolls became taught as they deepened. His hands looked like blown up rubber gloves, his fat fingers sticking out at curious angles. Still he grew fatter and fatter! The rumbling of his gut and the stretching of his skin was deafening. He was a gigantic ball of fat about to explode!

The chemicals contained within his fat cells were becoming more potent with each second. They began to release vast amounts of energy within his expanding girth. It seemed as if the chemicals were determined to fit more fat into him. Slowly, he began to grow taller. He gasped as he realised her head and shoulders being slowly lifting up into the air by his expanding body. The energy in his fat cells began to spark through the neurons in his brain, he began to feel ecstatic and happy by her tremendous size. He was still getting fatter but his arms and torso were also growing longer and wider as he grew into a much, much bigger boy than anyone could have predicted. His form was becoming a tremendous and menacing sight to see.

He was becoming a giant! Fat flowed everywhere as he ballooned bigger, steadily filling out threatening to fill entire room. His body pressed up against the feeding machinery and robot arms which fell, the ground shook as his fattening form continued to widen out.

Gohan felt on top of the world. The excess displays of gluttony he showed this month had been leading to this. He blissfully willed herself bigger and fatter wanting to see just how big and fat he could get before he exploded.

Just when he thought he was about to explode, the growth finally stopped.

The chemicals saved him from bursting.

“Wow... I’m so full...” Gohan moaned as his hair felt the ceiling above him, as he drifted off to sleep again, and woke up to see Chi-Chi.

122.content:
"You're growing so fast Gohan! In fact, I think we should go to Satan City this weekend for some new clothes. After all, I can't keep sewing them back together now can I?" said Son Chi-Chi to her son Gohan who was currently in nothing but white briefs and a too small T-shirt. Currently, Chi-Chi and Gohan were having a conversation while she mended his shorts, which had torn earlier.

As she was finishing her task, Gohan started to think on his growth. Normally, Gohan was used to growing, but not like this. For instead of gaining muscle, he was now gaining some very unwanted fat. When this had started two weeks ago, they had been visiting Bulma and her husband Vegeta, who had been the one to give him an explanation.

When a Saiyan reaches puberty, they start to store fat for one year in response to the major growth spurt and power increase at the end. This of course meant that they would need a lot of excess energy, about 25 to 200 pounds of fat, with age having no factor. They could be 12, like Goku was while was going through his phase, and gained only 20 pounds, or like Gohan, who although he was only a year older than Goku was at age 13, was already past 15 pounds and was showing no signs of stopping.

'I can't believe this.' thought Gohan, 'It feels wrong having all this fat. I'm starting to feel so powerless and weak.'

And poor Gohan was starting to look the part too. His once handsome and chiseled face was starting to round out to the point of resembling his cherubic features of seven. His well toned abs were covered in a thick layer of flab which poked out of his shirt and hung slightly over his briefs. His arms, which once had the strength to lift a hundred thousand boulders easily, were becoming soft and jiggly. And legs that could run around the globe in a minute were plump and were quickly losing their tan, becoming more pale then he had seen in a while. Also, his bottom, which used to be what most girls would consider a finely made sculpture, was transforming into a quivering mass with dimples that shook a little bit if you looked closely enough.

And on top of his jock-gone-to-fat physique, the half-sayian's power had diminished to the point where he couldn't turn super sayian 2 and could only hold super sayian for a short while. The reason behind his power drain was due to the fact that his body was turning most of his power into more fat. By the end of his growth, he would only be as strong as Krillin, which was quite weak for him considering who his father was.

"But right now, let's me cook dinner. We can discuss you're new clothes later. Now go get Goten for me outside and I'll make your favorite dishes." heard a startled Gohan as Chi-Chi gave him back his shorts.

"And try not to tear your shorts again soon. We still have to make them last two more days." said his mother as she was exiting his room.

"Sure mom, be right back." he said after regaining his composure.

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
Flying out of his bedroom window, Gohan quickly found his brother and took him home. After eating an enormous dinner, (which he know would show up again later somewhere on his body) he dressed in his pajamas and started to sleep when Goten came in.

"Gohan, can I sleep here tonight? There's a weird noise coming outside and I'm scared," said a frightened Goten.

Gohan, who knew that it was just the tree scratching against the window since Goten's room used to be his own, was too tired to turn away Goten and let climb into his bed.

"Sure Goten, climb in," said a yawning Gohan.

"Thanks Gohan," replied his grateful brother.

As Goten climbed into his bed, he realized that it was more cramped than expected and as he accidentally brushed his hand against Goten's belly, he found out why.

Goten was chubby. In fact, he wasn't chubby. He was just plain out FAT!

Since Goten was a sayian, it was not unexpected when he started to talk complete sentences at three. However, it was unusual to already be chubby this young, human or sayian.

'It can't be genetics, I am, or I was never fat nor was dad. And mom's pretty thin for her age. It could just be overeating. I mean, with all the food mom feeds him, it's no wonder that...he's...fat...'

"Mom," he whispered.

'Of course! Mom's always trying to making him eat more at every meal. And he always gives him snacks all the time. Plus, he's never gotten any formal training before. And if he only eats a fraction of what I eat...'

"Hey Goten, why don't you take off your shirt, it's kinda hot tonight," Gohan said suddenly as an thought, one that he hoped wasn't true, came to mind.

"Well, it is kinda hot. And this shirt is starting to feel tight. Okay Gohan!" replied an eager Goten as he stripped off his shirt.

As the shirt came off, Gohan's fears were confirmed and he recoiled at the thought of what it meant for him.

Goten's little body was not a pretty sight. His stomach was huge blob that hung over his pants and down towards his crotch. At his sides were a large bunch of rolls which made up his love handles. His chest was composed of two flabby sayian boy breasts that rested on his gut. His neck was virtually non-existent and his face was plump with round cheeks and a generous second chin. And his arms which should have started to show signs of muscle, was instead thick and look as if he wouldn't be able to cross them.

And as he turned around, Gohan could also see how fat his back was. He also managed to see the top part of his butt stick out.

"You're right Gohan, I find so much better now! Good night!" Goten said as he rolled over.

"Good night Goten," Gohan said absentmindedly.

'If mom did that to Goten, then who knows what she's gonna do to me. She's obviously gonna try to fatten me up, especially since I've gained weight. And since I know I eat more than Goten..."

Here, he slowly raised his hand to touch his new acquired belly, which he swore was growing bigger while his hand was on it.

"... I'm probably gonna be a lot bigger than him."

Slowly, he raised his shirt and examined his belly, which made tiny ripple as it shook.

"And mom's got the entire year. Oh Kami, I'm not just gonna be bigger, I'm gonna be HUGE!!!"

Gohan thought about that a bit more, before he decide to plot on how to prevent his mother's plans.

"I love her and all, but I will NOT get any bigger than I have to!" said a one very determined Gohan.

Fast forward to...
122.title: Chubby phase

1221.content:
*** there might be some grammar errors/misspellings, but that's because I'm a Dutch girl.***

"Good evening, how can I help you?" said the lady behind the counter and gave a warm smile. "Hi, well.. We are looking for new clothes for my son", Chi-Chi said, looking at Gohan's direction.

He was ashamed by his increased girth and the way the lady looked at him made him even feel more embarassed. His soft belly made his vest strain to keep closed and his well-rounded love handles poked out a bit. Goten looked at him and was impressed by the new features of his big brother. He had never noticed Gohan's weight gain, up till now. Gohan felt so uncomfortable that he moved his arms around his waist and grabbed his lovehandles to cover them up. This made him look even fatter, because his gut was sticking out from the bottom and was slightly hanging over his pants.
"Ok, well I can see he's a bit chubbier than the average teen....." and she walked through the store to grab some shirts and jeans and returned, ".....so I think he will definitely fit those," she said and handed Chi-Chi one jeans and two T-shirts. "I hope so, because this is our last chance today to find clothes for him that will fit," Chi-Chi whispered and gazed at Gohan.
"Those are awesome and I think I will fit them. I would really like to try these on," Gohan said and walked to the changing room.
A few minutes later he came out of the changing room with the jeans on and a white tee. "The jeans really suit you," the lady said and nodded at Chi-Chi. His slighty thicker thighs fit the XL-sized jeans, but the waistline seemed a bit too snug. But that was ok, because it made him look cute. His bellybutton was shining through his white tee as a dark hole, but it actually seemed to fit fairly.

To be continued within an hour..... (I have to go to the mall right now)
1221.title: This weekend, at  the Satan City megamall...

notices it and decides that a senzu bean sundae could be a great prank to play

1222.content:
"999,998...999,999...1,000,000! I think that's enough for today! Let's go inside and see what's for lunch." said a sweaty Gohan getting up from the ground.

Doing push-ups was only part of Gohan's plan to prevent himself from falling further into his mother's plans for obesity. Unfortunately, while his excerising was doing him some good considering he only gained 5 pounds this week instead of another 10, as a saiyan, the thought of dieting and portion control never came to his mind. And that could possibly cause his downfall.

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
In the Kitchen some hours later:

As Gohan and Goten were finishing up a lunch with enough food to satisfy 6 sumo wrestlers, Chi-Chi was putting a Senzu bean on a sundae.

'Hopefully,' she thought, 'Gohan will be too tired and full to realize there's a senzu bean instead of a cherry. If this all goes to plan, the calories from his lunch and the calories from the sunzu bean should make him gain about thirty pounds!'

You see, since Gohan's already full body and the senzu's affect to make you feel full for three days would stop him from moving for a while, the calories he consumed would make him gain a big amount of weight in a small amount in a short amount of time. Especially considering that it took a LOT of calories to make someone feel full for three days.

As Chi-chi went to give Gohan the sundae, Gohan...

Chi-chi watched this exchange in the kitchen, a smile on her face 'why didn't i think of that,'she though,' now both of them will get fat!!!,'ive got to do this evrey night!!!'

They don't know that they are now gonna get fatter faster now(Gohan does not want to but Goten is listening to Chi-Chi who is telling him he is supposed to be like this) At dinner Chi-Chi tells Gohan that he will go to school next week and Gohan tries to convince her not to but Chi-Chi still says he has to go, even if he weighs more than 600 pounds.

He is gonna feel sorry that he will do this to himself and his brother, but it will be better then being made fun of because they take so long to waddle around. He then calls Bulma and tells her what have been happening to Goten and himself and asks her to make a fat ray that makes the user gain weight for how long you shoot it at them, but also take the fat it makes away also. It will also make their hunger increase to.

Bulma said she could get it to him by.......

1311.content: "Is my little baby still hungry?" Said Chi Chi cutely. "Well luckily for you I bought some ice cream just for my special Goten." Chi Chi brought out a tub of ice cream with a spoon and gave it to Goten. As he dug into the sweet ice cream, Chi Chi rubbed his soft belly. After finishing off the tub of ice cream, Goten looked down at his belly, it ached and it was bulging over his pants just a bit. "Sweety, why don't you invite your friend Trunks over, there's plenty of food for him too." Suggested Chi Chi. Goten then decided too...
1311.title: Goten wants more

13111.content:
After a phone call here or there, Goten had retreated to his room to play with his belly while he waited for his best friend, not knowing about Chi-Chi calling Bulma at this very moment, discussing something.

“Well let’s just I hope they agree, see you later!” Chi-Chi then hung up as she went back to preparing more food for her baby boy.

Half an hour later, both Bulma and Trunks had arrived.

“Hey, Aunt Chi-Chi!” Trunks kindly greeted, as his gigantic belly jiggled from walking, being obviously much fatter than his younger friend.. Goten was not at all overweight like Trunks was, but he was still fat. Goten had a belly that like Trunks made his clothes ride up, thus exposing the large ball of flesh he had. But for Goten it was only up to his belly button and not the whole thing, and the rest of his body was less chunky too compared to his friend’s.

“Good day, Trunks! Goten’s in his room waiting for you!”

“Alright, talk to you later, Mom!” Trunks exclaimed, heading up to see Goten, and once the door closed, Bulma and Chi-Chi both took a seat on the couch.

“You really want to do this, Chi?”

“I just don’t want my baby boy to end up like his father, and I know you want the same.”

“I get it, but this way... it’s just...”

“Bulma, we’ll give them a choice... alright?”

Bulma sighed. “Okay.”

They both got up from the couch, and headed up to Goten’s room where he and Trunks were pigging out on a number of sweets, but not acting like slobs.

“Boys... may we speak to you, please?” Chi-Chi inquired, catching the attention of the two half-Saiyans. “Sure, what is it, Mom.”

The females looked at each other before looking back at the boys. “Now... this may be strange, but just listen. Me and Bulma have been talking about this for a while and we...wanted to know, if... you two boys wanted to get fatter.”

This surprised the two Saiyans that their mothers were encouraging this.

“Me and Chi-Chi had already made plans for this and we just want your honest opinion, guys. It’s, alright if you say no...”

Goten and Trunks both started to feel guilty of the possibility of saying no. “Well, we both like you’re cooking, Mom,” Goten praised.

“And I’m starting to get bored of training so much...” Trunks added on. “And to be honest, I kind of like all this.”

“We can both make you as fat as possible, as long as none of you become greedy and begin to demand us for anything.”

To their surprise, the two Saiyans were now hugging their parents. “It’s alright, Mom. We know you mean well,” Trunks said.

“Yeah, you guys are the best moms in the whole wide world.” Chi-Chi had almost cried when she heard Goten form those words, as she couldn’t be more happier.

Later that day, a capsule fell into the ground from a helicopter high above, and once the capsule hit the floor, smoke began to engulf the majority of the area, revealing a very tall building almost the size of a city.

“Wow, that’s so big!” Goten exclaimed as Bulma landed the helicopter on the ground at the entrance of the building, and they all got off following her.

As they entered, it looked like the entrance to a mansion, with a giant staircase and an elevator at the top standing between two doors in giant gaps.

With two doors on each side, with the names Trunks and Goten. It was obvious the boys had to go to those designated rooms, so that’s what they did, while Chi-Chi and Bulma went around the stairs, being downstairs still, and in front of them laid an elevator.

Half an hour passed, and the two boys still haven’t seen their parents, but then they both came wheeling in each room with a giant array of food on a table with wheels, as they laid in their giant beds, in a room which was a hundred times bigger than them. On the table we’re bowls of candy, chocolates, and chips. There were also plates of cookies, donuts, sausages, a large cake, and even more. Goten’s belly rumbled at the sight of these.

“Here you go, sweetie,” Chi-Chi said as she handed out a giant gummy bear from the table, cut it in half and handed it to Goten, who began to devour it without any relative ease, and was able to hold the gummy bear in her maw due to her expanded cheeks, but barely. After enough chewing, he swallowed the whole load of gummy bear, his belly pushed out just from that.

“URP!”

“Excuse you, Goten.”

“Sorry, Mom.”

In the other room, pretty much the same thing was happening, fattening up their children the best they could, as Trunks had a tube in his mouth attatched to the top from his bed, and also had another sector for a funnel, which Bulma used to put any sort of food in.

Trunks’ body was expanding by the second, his belly kept rising, his arms growing to the size of tree trunks, his face getting chubbier, it was glorious.
13111.title: Invite Trunks over and both of them pig out

choices: His friend Trunks, who was just as big as him.
13112.content:
After taking a nap, he had woken up to the sight of his supposed snack right next to him, which was a bag of chips, two bottles of soda, a whole tub of vanilla ice cream, and an whole ice cream cake, cut into multiple pieces on the side, all laying on a giant tray, in Chi-Chi’s hands.

“Wow, all of this for me?!” Goten exclaimed, getting up as his belly jiggled a bit, though he was still sitting down on his bed, but not laying down on it.

“What do you think, Goten? All of this just for you being a good boy with your studies!” Chi-Chi replied with sincerity in her voice, putting the tray down in front of the chubby Saiyan, and leaving the room, closing the door and leaving Goten to attend to his sweets.

What he didn’t know was that Chi-Chi had actually made the ice cream and the ice cream cake, with him simply assuming he bought it. One of the ingredients for the desserts were senzu beans, although they weren’t visible as a full bean, simply mushed up like a smoothie inside the desserts.

Since Goten’s already full body and the senzu's affect to make you feel full for three days would stop him from moving for a while, the calories he would consume would make him gain a big amount of weight in a small amount in a short amount of time. Especially considering that it took a LOT of calories to make someone feel full for three days. And finally, a serum specifically designed for weight gain put in both of them, but along with it carried an irresistible taste.

Once Goten had finished the tray completely, he seemed to look just the same as he did before, 250 pounds. He got off his bed and tried his best to stand up straight on the floor, but then he heard a rumble, a loud one coming from his belly, much to his confusion.

“Hey, what’s wrong, belly?” Goten asked his stomach, poking it softly, then it happened.

His back then slightly grew some fat, along with his sides as his belly began to grow, eventually hitting the ground, as he himself began to grow taller as well. The ten year old half-Saiyan was now scared for his life as his body began to expand at an alarming rate. His arms and legs were getting chubbier as well, and was now wider and fatter than ever.

“Uh... help! Someone help me!” Goten pleaded as his fat still began to fill out the room, and his head grew closer to the ceiling above him. He was well over a thousand pounds now, as his legs gave in, as he sat down and his belly completely overlapped his legs, and his face seemed chubbier as well. Tears began to escape the little boy’s eyes of what was to become of him, but then, somehow, this felt good, in fact, so good they he laughed a bit, as he still got wider and fatter, his fat now taking up almost his whole room, and the door was straining as well to keep a hold of his fat.

Downstairs, Chi-Chi smiled to herself as she heard the door creak. She didn’t think he would grow so big, but she wasn’t complaining if he wouldn’t be able to train. She then went outside with a ladder, placed it and headed over towards the room, climbing over the window which was also struggling to hold in the fat, and once she reached the ceiling, she saw some cracks beginning to form on it, and out came Goten’s chubby head.

“Oh, hey Mom!” Goten exclaimed, now as happy and innocent as usual, as Chi-Chi smiled and responded in kind. It was a good thing Goku and Gohan were on an interstellar vacation for a while, not needing to see this. “Hello, my sweetie, did you enjoy your treats?”

“Yeah! Yeah! Do we have any more food? I’m getting really hungry now! Can I have more, please?!”

Chi-Chi of course, obliged. “Okay, Goten. Ten courses coming up, jeez you Saiyans!”

“Thanks Mom!” Goten thanked, as she saw his loving mother head towards the ladder, but then stopped.

“Uh, Mom?”

Chi-Chi then pulled something out from her pocket, a small bottle with purple liquid, as she opened the cap, and drank it whole, then headed towards Goten, and bent down right in front of his face. She smiled slyly to herself, it seemed space really did have it’s uses with some things she brought from other planets thanks to Goku.

“Hey, do you have another one of those too, Mom?” She didn’t response, as she took a very deep breath, for a long time, then blew into Goten’s mouth, who’s cheeks exploded in size, as well as his body, completely destroying his room and began to slowly plummet down towards the bottom of the house, the multiple walls began to creak, with Goten panicking. It seemed the senzu beans were now doing their job, as the 5000 pound Saiyan still grew and grew, as his body was completely exposed, with Chi-Chi on top of it, no longer on top of a roof, as he rose in height as well, still being fed by Chi-Chi with what he thought was air.

After ten more seconds, she stopped blowing and back away, laying down on Goten’s fat, 6000 pound body. There was almost nothing left of the house, save for the kitchen.

“Urrrrp!” Goten burped, as his vision began to blur, as he now felt sleepy. “Wow, what was... that...”

Chi-Chi warmly smiled as she slid off her son’s fat with ease safely, and began to make a phone call.

Later that night, Goten woke up, but this time, he noticed he was in a room again, but it was about ten times larger than he was, with a window showcasing the rising sun in the open plains. And next to him was..

This takes us back to the time when fat Buu was facing his evil, skinny alter ego. The skinny Buu returned the transformation beam back to the fat Buu, transforming the fat one into chocolate.

"Buu!" Hercule said.

The skinny Buu slowly walked towards the chocolate, but Hercule picked it up. Trying to be brave, he yelled at the skinny Buu.

"You won´t have it! I´m going to protect this chocolate, since it is what remains from my newest friend! I´m Hercule! The world champion!" he said.

The skinny Buu stared at Hercule, and kept walking towards him.

"What should I do?" Hercule thought.

Hercule decided to eat the chocolate.

"Hawhawhaw! I ate it! Now you can´t have it! ...Whoa! I suddenly feel dizzy..." Hercule said.

Suddenly, his abs were covered by a weird layer of fat that made his belly bigger and rounder. A group of small holes appeared on Hercule´s forearms.

"It seems that the chocolate of Buu is giving me some kind of power! It feels great!" he said.

He flexed his arms and the biceps-triceps combo were growing at an impressive speed. They grew to 30" inches. His chest expanded as well, and his belly was almost as huge as the one that the fat Buu had. A pink steam sprouted from the holes in his forearms.

"I like this" Hercule said.
